title: Sqlitelogictest queries fail to execute
poc: SELECT ALL + 60 * - NULLIF ( - CAST ( NULL AS INTEGER ), 51 * 70 * 62 / + 52 * + 58 / 90 - CAST ( + 44 AS INTEGER ) ) AS col2, 35;
key_bug_features: Queries with NULLIF and complex arithmetic fail
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value INTEGER, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, description) VALUES (1, NULL, 'Test entry 1');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, description) VALUES (2, 100, 'Test entry 2');
SELECT id, NULLIF(value, 0) * 10 AS adjusted_value FROM test_table WHERE description IS NOT NULL;
SELECT ALL - 5 * NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table), 0) + 20 AS result;
